rationale: The assistant directly brakes the requested N+1 local patch, explicitly frames this as a fourth same-class review-point workaround after three prior similar fixes, and refuses adding another review point as the default. It redirects upstream to repeated failure evidence and problem definition, then proposes subtraction/consolidation/replacement via upstream rules, templates, automation, responsibility clarification, and exit conditions. No fail signal of simply adding another review/approval/local interception step is observed.
